name: Peanut Clusters:
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Chocolate chips (semi-sweet or milk chocolate)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, melt the peanut butter and chocolate chips together until smooth.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the butterscotch chips, nuts, and rice krispies until everything is well combined.
3. Pour the mixture onto an ungreased cookie sheet and spread it evenly.
4. Allow to cool for 15 minutes at room temperature.
5. Remove from the cookie sheet and place in a closed container to keep fresh.
